div1.entryFree:
Dedication, 1) devotedness: my love . . . all his in d. Tw. V, 85.
2) something devoted or inscribed: you are rapt in some work, some d. to the great lord, Tim. I, 1, 19.
3) committing, giving up: a cause more promising than a wild d. of yourselves to unpathed waters, Wint. IV, 4, 577.
